value.found_quote: Use Codex in Linear to delegate work from issues. Assign an issue to Codex or mention `@Codex` in a comment, and Codex creates a cloud task and replies with progress and results... Connect Linear for local tasks (MCP): If you're using the Codex app, CLI, or IDE Extension and want Codex to access Linear issues locally, configure Codex to use the Linear Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
value.name: Codex for Linear
